title: Prisoner of the Iron Bars
original_title: O Prisioneiro da Grade de Ferro (Auto-Retratos)
overview: In 2002, the greatest prison in Latin America, Complex Carandiru, was demolished. A couple of months before its implosion, director Paulo Sacramento trained some inmates and together with his crew, they produced many hours of footage, showing daily life in prison.
